subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! A hundred thousand queens of the world have yearned for the privilege to speak through the tongue of one of His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله صد هزار ملکه های عالم آرزوی آن را داشته که از لسان بنده از بندگان
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
